metadata.tagline: Get stronger, faster, and more agile. Smash your personal bests
metadata.purpose: Detailed visual dashboard with FULL scripts and guidance

approaches.script: (Notice their athletic gear or physique) "Hey! I can tell you take your training seriously — love to see it. I'm [Your Name]. I work with a product called Victory that helps athletes boost strength, endurance, and agility without any banned substances or drugs. What kind of training are you into?"

"Hey [Friend's Name]! How's the training going? You know how you've been saying you feel like you've hit a plateau? I started using this patch called Victory, and my lifts and endurance have been noticeably better. It's completely drug-free — works through vibrotactile technology. Have you ever tried anything like that to break through a training wall?"

"Hey [Name]! Saw your workout post — that looked like a killer session! I've been using a product called Victory that supports strength, endurance, and agility naturally. It's a drug-free patch and it's honestly helped me push past my limits. Would you be interested in learning how it could fit into your routine?"

"Hi [Prospect Name], I'm [Your Name]. [Referrer's Name] told me you're serious about your performance and always looking for a competitive edge. I work with a product called Victory that enhances strength, endurance, and agility using drug-free vibrotactile technology — no supplements, no stimulants. Would you be open to hearing how athletes are using it to smash their personal bests?"

"Awesome event! So what keeps you busy? (Listen and respond genuinely.) Nice — you seem like someone who stays active! I actually help athletes and fitness enthusiasts take their performance up a notch with a product called Victory. It's a drug-free patch that supports strength and endurance naturally. What does your current training look like?"

2b_rapport_story.title: 🫂 BUILD RAPPORT
2b_rapport_story.description: Share your personal story to build trust
2b_rapport_story.personal_story: I've always been active, but I was hitting a wall with my workouts. Recovery was taking forever and I just couldn't push through like I used to. My training partner started using Victory and wouldn't shut up about it. So I tried it — first week, I noticed I was recovering faster and my endurance was better. It felt like I got five years back. Total game changer for staying active.
talking_points: Talk about your active lifestyle and where you hit a wall
Mention the recovery struggles — athletes and gym-goers get it
Share how quickly the difference showed up in your workouts
Describe the feeling of performing at a higher level again
Emphasize it's drug-free — important for anyone who's active
2b_rapport_story.transition_to_discovery: That's what hooked me. But I'm curious about you — what are you into? Are you finding it harder to keep up with your routine?

questions.question: What does your current training routine look like, and what are you working toward right now?
What would your ideal performance level look like — if you could train at your absolute peak, what would that feel like?
Have you hit any plateaus recently where you feel like you're putting in the work but not seeing the gains?
How's your recovery time between sessions — do you feel like you're bouncing back fast enough, or does soreness hold you back?
When it comes to competition or game day, do you ever feel like you're leaving performance on the table despite your preparation?
If your strength, endurance, and agility were all firing at a higher level, how would that change your results in training or competition?
How does feeling stuck in your performance affect your motivation and consistency with training?
What are you currently doing for pre-workout prep — any supplements, routines, or rituals to get your body ready to perform?
Have you ever tried anything specifically for natural performance enhancement — something that isn't a stimulant or banned substance?
If there was a way to support your strength, endurance, and recovery naturally without adding another pill or powder to your routine, would that be worth exploring?

content.problem: You're putting in the work — the early mornings, the strict training, the discipline — but the results just aren't matching the effort anymore. You've hit a wall where your lifts stall, your times plateau, and recovery takes longer than it should. It's frustrating to train harder than ever and feel like you're spinning your wheels.
content.agitate: That plateau doesn't just affect your numbers — it gets inside your head. You start questioning your program, your genetics, even your commitment. Meanwhile, the competition keeps leveling up, and every session where you don't improve feels like you're falling behind. The supplements, the pre-workouts, the recovery stacks — none of it seems to be enough to break through. {{discovery_callback}}
content.solve: Victory is built for exactly this moment. Victory uses Vibrotactile Technology to support your body's natural performance pathways — strength, endurance, and agility — without putting a single substance into your system. No banned ingredients, no stimulants, no loading phases. Just a patch that works with your nervous system so your body can perform the way your training deserves.

objections.response: I totally understand. Quick question — how much are you spending on pre-workouts, protein supplements, BCAAs, and recovery products each month? Most serious athletes drop $150-$300 without batting an eye. Victory supports your strength, endurance, and agility in one patch for a fraction of that, with zero banned substances. What's it worth to break through your plateau and hit a new PR?
objections.psychology: Reframe cost by comparing to their existing supplement stack and the value of performance breakthroughs

objections.response: Absolutely — I'd want to be sure too. What's the main thing you're weighing? Is it whether Victory will actually make a difference in your training, or more about how it works alongside your current routine? A lot of athletes try it during one session and feel the difference in their endurance right away. What would help you decide?
objections.psychology: Isolate the real hesitation — efficacy vs. fit — and anchor to an immediate, tangible training test

objections.response: Totally makes sense. What do you think their biggest concern would be — the investment or the safety side? One thing that usually puts partners at ease is that Victory is 100% drug-free, has no banned substances, and nothing enters the bloodstream. It's just a patch that supports your body's own performance. Would it help to share the info so they can see exactly what it is?
objections.psychology: Proactively address the safety/drug-free angle that typically concerns a partner of an athlete

objections.response: I love that you're asking. Victory uses Vibrotactile Technology — it works through your nervous system to support natural strength, endurance, and agility. No stimulants, no banned substances, nothing entering your bloodstream. What would make you a believer — would you want to wear it during your next training session and compare your numbers to your last workout?
objections.psychology: Let them define proof by proposing a measurable, head-to-head training comparison

objections.response: I get it — most athletes have gone through a cabinet full of pre-workouts, creatine, BCAAs, test boosters, the whole stack. What happened with those? Usually it's diminishing returns, stomach issues, or concerns about what's actually in them. Victory is fundamentally different — VTT works through your nervous system, not your digestive system. No substances at all. What was the biggest issue with the supplements you've tried?
objections.psychology: Differentiate VTT from the entire supplement industry by highlighting a completely different mechanism of action

objections.response: No problem at all. I'm just curious — are you content with where your performance is right now, or is it more that you've been burned by products that overpromise? If you've hit a plateau and nothing has broken through it, that's actually the exact scenario where Victory makes the biggest impact because it works through a mechanism your body hasn't adapted to yet.
objections.psychology: Distinguish between satisfaction with current performance and frustration from ineffective supplements

objections.response: I hear you — your schedule is packed. But here's the thing: Victory doesn't add anything to your routine. It's a patch — peel and stick before your workout, that's it. No mixing, no timing around meals, no loading phases. If you're already training hard and short on time, wouldn't you want to make sure every session counts? That's exactly what Victory is designed for.
objections.psychology: Reframe Victory as a zero-effort performance multiplier for time they're already investing in training

objections.response: Great — what are you comparing it to? Most performance products — pre-workouts, creatine, stimulant blends — put substances into your body that can cause crashes, GI distress, or flag in drug testing. Victory uses VTT to work with your nervous system to support your body's natural strength and endurance. Zero banned substances, nothing in your bloodstream, and it works from the very first use with no loading phase. What matters most to you — the ingredients list, the results, or both?
objections.psychology: Highlight VTT as a clean, test-safe alternative vs. every substance-based performance product

6_closing.title: 🏆 5 CLOSING TECHNIQUES
6_closing.pre_close: Always ask: 'Do you have any questions?' + 'Does this make sense?'

techniques.name: ASSUMPTIVE
techniques.script: Let's go — you're ready to start crushing your workouts and getting that competitive edge. Let's get Victory shipped to you so you can feel the difference at your next session. What's the best address?
techniques.when: They've talked about hitting a plateau, wanting faster recovery, or needing a performance edge and are clearly fired up to try it

techniques.name: ALTERNATIVE
techniques.script: Would you want to start with a 30-day supply to test it through a training cycle, or go with the 90-day pack so you're covered through your entire competition season without a gap?
techniques.when: They're sold on the performance benefits but deciding how much to commit — frame the options around their training or competition calendar

techniques.name: URGENCY
techniques.script: We've got a limited-time promotion right now — and honestly, every workout without Victory is a session where you're leaving gains on the table. Your next competition or PR attempt isn't going to wait. Want to lock this in today?
techniques.when: They're excited but stalling — remind them that their training window and competition dates don't pause

techniques.name: SUMMARY
techniques.script: So let me recap — you want to crush your workouts, recover faster between sessions, and get that competitive edge over everyone else in the gym or on the field, all without banned substances. That's exactly what Victory is built for. Ready to level up?
techniques.when: Detailed conversation about training goals, plateaus, and recovery — bring it all together before asking for the commitment

techniques.name: REFERRAL
techniques.script: Now that you're about to take your performance to the next level, who else in your circle — a training partner, a teammate, someone in your gym — would want this same edge?
techniques.when: After they've purchased and are pumped about the performance gains — athletes love sharing what gives them an edge with their training partners and team

7_followup.title: 📅 FOLLOW-UP SEQUENCE
7_followup.goal: Build relationship → Get testimonials → Generate referrals

sequence.template: Hey {{FirstName}}! Just confirming your samples are on the way. You should receive them in about 2 days. I'll check back in when they arrive!
Hey {{FirstName}}! Your samples should be arriving today or tomorrow. Have they shown up yet? Let me know when they do — don't open them without me!
Before we open it, I want you to understand. This isn't about hype. It's about experience. I want you to pay attention to what you notice, not what you expect.

Hey {{FirstName}}, checking in! What did you notice today?
What felt different?
When did you feel it most?
What surprised you?
How is your performance? Are you noticing any improvements in your workouts or recovery? What feels different?
Hope you're loving the results! Ready to keep the momentum going? Who else do you know that wants to take their performance to the next level?
Based on everything you've experienced — are you ready to make this part of your routine? Let's get you set up.
